items.title: Restore indexer definition runtime wiring
prerequisites: Load definition source directory in runtime boot path
Define fallback behavior when definition is missing
verificationExitCriteria: Cardigann indexer test endpoint succeeds with loaded definition
Release search no longer fails with Definition not found
Add runtime probe evidence under evidence/runtime

items.title: Harden metadata provider key and upstream behavior
prerequisites: Define explicit TMDB key readiness checks
Define normalized failure taxonomy for upstream 404/401
verificationExitCriteria: Movie search passes with configured key and clear error when missing
TV search has fallback or normalized retryable error policy
Runtime probes for both paths produce deterministic envelopes

items.title: Normalize indexer contract payload model and validation
verificationExitCriteria: Invalid settings payload returns validation envelope (not INTERNAL_ERROR)
Indexer create/edit API contract matches frontend schema
Contract tests and runtime probes both pass

items.title: Stabilize release search-to-grab lifecycle
verificationExitCriteria: Series/movie lifecycle status transitions verified in runtime
At least one integration journey per media type recorded

items.title: Implement subtitle variant console parity
verificationExitCriteria: Subtitles route is no longer placeholder-only
Manual search/download flows enforce variant scope with validation envelope

hardeningGates.policy: Track 7F cannot be marked complete while any listed finding remains unresolved at P0/P1 severity.
No capability may be promoted to PARITY_IMPLEMENTED without contract + runtime evidence recorded in matrix and validation report.

trackDependencyUpdates.update: Add hard dependency on closure of Track 9 P0/P1 backlog items RMB-001 through RMB-005.
Sequence subtitle UI completion after RMB-005 API validation normalization tasks are merged.
Prioritize settings/activity completeness only after RMB-002 metadata hardening to avoid false-green UX state.

followUpTracks.scope: Definition loader -> runtime factory wiring and Cardigann end-to-end route compatibility
TMDB key readiness, TV provider fallback, normalized external failure taxonomy
Definition-driven indexer create/edit payload and validation envelope normalization
Wanted search->grab->queue->activity and import lifecycle runtime journey closure
Subtitle operations parity from placeholder route to full manual workflow
